name: indent_from_top

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.6 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] ［＃天からN字下げ］ is the head-anchored single-line indent — N full-width spaces measured from the head (天) of the line, the top-edge counterpart of ［＃地からN字上げ］. It renders identically to a plain ［＃N字下げ］; the from_top flag preserves the source spelling for round-trip. ~280 occurrences. Offsets from the §3 byte model; not read back from a processor.

source: 本文［＃天から３字下げ］続き

expected.serialize: 本文［＃天から3字下げ］続き
